extracted_text:
Module 10: Streamlit Dashboard

What dashboard does: choose a movie
see recommendations
see similarity results
see charts about taste
understand why recommendations were given.

Possible Dashboard Sections: search bar for movie
user profile panel
recommended movie cards
explanation text
chart for genres, decades, actors
sentiment score view

Skills: Streamlit basics, displaying tables/cards/charts, calling backend/model

Module 11: Evaluation & Testing

What can be evaluated? 
recommendations relevant?
do users get movies they may like?
does hybrid perform better than single methods?
does sentiment re-ranking help?

Simple Metrics: RMSE
Precision
Recall
